activity.name: Rule: Regular Attack Rolls w/o Advantage-unknown
Rule: Sneak/Reckless Attack Rolls with Advantage-unknown
Rule: Action & Resources Used for Attack-complete
Rule: Sneak/Reckless Attack Rolls with Advantage-complete
Rule: Action & Resources Used for Attack-unknown
Rule: Attack Roll >= Enemy Armor Class -> Hit-unknown
Rule: Regular Attack Rolls w/o Advantage-complete
Rule: Attack Roll >= Enemy Armor Class -> Hit-complete

template.description: Rule: Sneak/Reckless Attack Rolls with Advantage-unknown has to be executed at least once.
template.name: existence

statemessages.message: <html>Task "A" has been executed at least one before.</html>

Task "A" has not been executed yet.

To satisfy this constraint you must execite task "A".

branch.name: Rule: Sneak/Reckless Attack Rolls with Advantage-unknown

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Validate Attack Action-unknown there has to be at least one Validate Attack Action-complete. and 2. Validate Attack Action-complete has to be preceded by Validate Attack Action-unknown. Validate Attack Action-complete can happen only after Validate Attack Action-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: Get Player Damage Roll-start has to be executed at least once.
template.name: existence

statemessages.message: <html>Task "A" has been executed at least one before.</html>

Task "A" has not been executed yet.

To satisfy this constraint you must execite task "A".

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Sync Player Data-unknown there has to be at least one Sync Player Data-complete. and 2. Sync Player Data-complete has to be preceded by Sync Player Data-unknown. Sync Player Data-complete can happen only after Sync Player Data-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: Wait for Message Display-unknown has to be executed at least once.
template.name: existence

statemessages.message: <html>Task "A" has been executed at least one before.</html>

Task "A" has not been executed yet.

To satisfy this constraint you must execite task "A".

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Reset Message Display-start there has to be at least one Reset Message Display-unknown. and 2. Reset Message Display-unknown has to be preceded by Reset Message Display-start. Reset Message Display-unknown can happen only after Reset Message Display-start had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Display Action Result Message-unknown there has to be at least one Display Action Result Message-complete. and 2. Display Action Result Message-complete has to be preceded by Display Action Result Message-unknown. Display Action Result Message-complete can happen only after Display Action Result Message-unknown had happened.
template.name: succession

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Rule: Action & Resources Used for Attack-complete there has to be at least one Visualize Intermediate Player Stats-start. and 2. Visualize Intermediate Player Stats-start has to be preceded by Rule: Action & Resources Used for Attack-complete. Visualize Intermediate Player Stats-start can happen only after Rule: Action & Resources Used for Attack-complete had happened.
template.name: succession

branch.name: Rule: Action & Resources Used for Attack-complete

template.description: response and precedence: 1. After every Get Player Attack Target-complete there has to be at least one Rule: Sneak/Reckless Attack Rolls with Advantage-unknown. and 2.
